BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: TEXAS SOCIETY OF CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS PEER ASSISTANCE FOUNDATION

IRS990EZ.PrimaryExemptPurposeTxt: TO HELP CPAs OR THEIR FAMILY MEMBERS OVERCOME SUBSTANCE ABUSE.

ProgramSrvcAccomplishmentGrp.DescriptionProgramSrvcAccomTxt: DURING THE YEAR, THE FOUNDATION'S PERSONNEL (INCLUDING 29 VOLUNTEERS) WORKED WITH 99 PERSONS COPING WITH MENTAL HEALTH PROBLEMS, ALCOHOL ABUSE, OR DRUG ABUSE.
